physical_page_offset_note: Body pages use Arabic numerals starting at physical page 9 = printed page 1; offset = physical_page - 8. Front matter uses Roman numerals.

mappings.evidence_note: Hong Kong DSE Biology Curriculum and Assessment Guide.
Compulsory + elective structure, total 250 curriculum hours.
Subtopics: life molecules, cell organisation, membrane transport, cell cycle/division, cell energetics.
Subtopics: basic genetics, molecular genetics, biodiversity and evolution.
Subtopics: plant life processes, animal life processes, reproduction/growth/development, coordination/response, homeostasis, ecosystems.
Subtopics: personal health, disease, body defence mechanisms.
Four elective topics: V-VIII; students choose 2; ~50 hours total.
Subtopics: osmoregulation, thermoregulation, blood-gas regulation, reproductive hormone control.
Subtopics: human impact, pollution control, conservation, global issues.
Subtopics: microbiology, use of microbes, microbial genetics, harmful microbes.
Subtopics: modern biotech techniques, applications, bioethics.
Elective part; answer 2 of 4 topics; 20%; 1 hour.
Knowledge/recall, application, scientific investigation, practical skills, data analysis, evaluation, STSE communication.
Multiple choice, short answer, structured, essay.
Introduction, curriculum planning, learning/teaching guidance, resources, appendices, references, committee lists.
